use_cases: Hero section animated headings with image-clipped typography
Landing page text reveal animations for brand introductions
Portfolio or project showcase title animations
Decorative animated text for marketing pages
Creative typography effects for visual storytelling
ai_summary: A minimalist text animation component that displays the words 'Text' and 'Animation' using background image clipping and gradient text effects. The typography uses large serif fonts with uppercase styling and responsive sizing across breakpoints. While currently static without scroll-triggered animations, it serves as a foundation for creating visually striking hero text with image-based text fills and subtle opacity effects.
